meta.description: Real code examples from the MSM Portal codebase for each page pattern. Agents should use these as templates when generating new pages. All paths are relative to msm-portal/js/msm-portal-web/.

examples.description: Reference implementation for list pages. Uses MCContentLayout with tabs and sub-containers per tab.
key_hooks: useSearchParams() — manages tab state via URL query params
useOrders({...}) — custom hook for data fetching (in sub-container)
useInAppAlert() — fireCollapsibleError for error handling (in sub-container)
useCurrentUser() — checks user role (isMediaRep) for conditional UI
examples.data_fetching_pattern: Custom hook (useOrders) wrapping msmAPI/tRPC query. Sub-containers fetch data per tab, main container only manages layout and tabs.
examples.tab_state_pattern: useSearchParams with a constant key (ORDER_TYPE_SEARCH_PARAM). Default tab set via useEffect with replace: true.
notes: Page is only 7 lines — purely imports and renders container
Main container owns layout (MCContentLayout, MCBarTabs) and navigation
Sub-containers own data fetching and error handling per tab
Table container (MCOrderListTableContainer) is shared across Available/Draft/Archived tabs with different data
Create button conditionally shown based on user role (isMediaRep)

examples.description: Auction order list follows the same pattern as order list.
Creative list with type-based sub-containers (Image, Video, NativeVideo, etc.).
notes: Creative types each have their own sub-container
Also has 'All' variants (MCAllImageCreativeListContainer) for cross-advertiser views
Order uses a stepper form (MCOrderStepperForm) for multi-step creation
Form config is extracted into a custom hook (useOrderFormConfig)
Form types and converter handle Formik values to/from proto

examples.description: Order detail page with dependent sub-containers.
notes: Detail container fetches entity by ID from route params
Navigates back to list on error with fireCollapsibleError

page_file.pattern: Every page file follows this exact structure: import container, render it, export default.

container_error_handling.pattern: All containers that fetch data use useInAppAlert + useEffect to handle errors.

container_tab_state.pattern: List containers manage tab state via URL search params, not React state.

container_create_button.pattern: Create button uses generatePathForRoute with MERouteKey and entity params.

media_rep_variants.pattern: MediaRep users get separate page files that import MediaRep-specific containers.

component_files.convention: MC{Entity}{View}.tsx or organized in subdirectories (table/, form/, detail/, dialog/)
